Theorem ssonunii 7764
Description: The union of a set of ordinal numbers is an ordinal number. Corollary 7N(d) of [Enderton] p. 193. (Contributed by NM, 20-Sep-2003.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
ssonuni.1 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
Assertion
Ref Expression
ssonunii ⊢ (𝐴 ⊆ On → ∪ 𝐴 ∈ On)
Proof of Theorem ssonunii
StepHypRef Expression
1 ssonuni.1 . 2 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
2 ssonuni 7763 . 2 ⊢ (𝐴 ∈ V → (𝐴 ⊆ On → ∪ 𝐴 ∈ On))
31, 2ax-mp 5 1 ⊢ (𝐴 ⊆ On → ∪ 𝐴 ∈ On)
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   ∈ wcel 2142  Vcvv 3454   ⊆ wss 3904  ∪ cuni 4865  Oncon0 6346
